description: Create a fully constrained 2D sketch of a 15mm open-ended wrench head with a 15-degree angular offset from the horizontal axis. The sketch must include an outer radius of 16.0 mm, an inner radius of 7.5 mm, and a closed profile with jaw segments parallel to the offset and tangent to the inner arc. Extrude the geometry to a thickness of 6.0 mm. Save the parametric model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/wrench_head.slvs and export the 3D mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/wrench_head.stl.
